arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe, Raphinha Face Setback in Ballon d’Or Poll as Ousmane Dembele Gains Ground
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembele has been one of the standout footballers of 2025. The Frenchman has netted 21 goals this year, with his latest coming in the second leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16 against Liverpool. arts.ttl: Barcelona Have €180M-Rated Liverpool, PSG Target as Perfect Robert Lewandowski Replacement
arts.sum: The winter transfer window has closed, and for now, Alexander Isak stays with Newcastle United. Although there wasn’t much talk of a move in January, reports suggest that several clubs, including PSG, may make another push for him this summer. arts.ttl: Barcelona and Atletico Madrid in Talks for PSG Target Expected to Leave Arsenal
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have plenty of talent in their midfield, but they lack height in the position. Fabian Ruiz is the tallest at 6-foot-2 (1.89m), and beyond him, there aren’t many players close to that stature. Senny Mayulu stands at 6 feet (1.83m), but the depth behind the 18-year-old is limited. As a result, PSG could […] The post Barcelona and Atletico Madrid in Talks for PSG Target Expected to Leave Arsenal appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Newcastle See €50M-Rated PSG Loanee at Juventus as Ideal Alexander Isak Replacement
arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani has hit the ground running at Juventus, tallying seven goal contributions in nine appearances since joining on loan from Paris Saint-Germain during the winter transfer window. PSG are hoping his strong form in Turin will attract interest ahead of the summer transfer window. arts.ttl: PSG, Tottenham Target’s Latest Update Bodes Well for Newcastle to Replace Callum Wilson
arts.sum: With Randal Kolo Muani now at Juventus, Paris Saint-Germain is looking to offload the French striker permanently, whether to the Turin club or another suitor. arts.ttl: Will PSG tie provide Champions League redemption for Emery?
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery will get a shot at redemption for the lowest point of his stellar European career when he faces former club Paris St-Germain in the Champions League quarter-final.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique sends plea to PSG fans over homophobic chant fears
arts.sum: PSG and Marseille's games are often fiercely contested and there are fears the top-of-the-table clash will be marred by homophobic abuse after vile chants were heard in the reverse fixture in October
